style: Premium Diablo-like dark fantasy waypoint row bitmap texture. Dark stone strip, aged brass edge, low contrast center. No SVG.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: waypoint row must keep destination labels readable while matching carved gothic portal materials.

prompt: Create one long horizontal bitmap UI texture for an unselected waypoint destination row in a Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG. Fill the entire canvas edge-to-edge with dark game UI material; absolutely no white canvas, no white border, no white padding, no paper background, no empty outside margin. Dark carved stone strip, black iron bevel, thin tarnished brass edge, quiet worn texture, shallow inset center for overlay text. Keep the middle low contrast and readable. No embedded text, no letters, no numbers, no icons, no arrows, no characters, no watermark. Avoid cyan modern UI, flat vector, SVG look, CSS gradient look, plastic shine, cartoon UI, bokeh, lens flare, white diagonal shine. Opaque PNG, production game UI strip.
acceptance: Long horizontal row texture suitable under HTML text.
No text, icon, arrow, character, or watermark is embedded.
Visual language matches the waypoint panel.
